headline: Should ON Semiconductor’s Sineng Design Win in Utility‑Scale Inverters Require Action From ON (ON) Investors?
summary: In late March 2026, Sineng Electric announced it will use Onsemi’s latest FS7 IGBT and EliteSiC hybrid power integrated modules in its new 430 kW liquid‑cooled energy storage systems and 320 kW utility‑scale solar string inverters to boost efficiency, power density and thermal performance. Benchmark data show these modules can lift inverter power-to-weight performance by about one‑third while trimming power losses, highlighting how incremental efficiency gains can materially improve output...
